title: Estimation Workflow for Common Time Series Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process and key considerations for estimating parameters in AR, MA, and ARMA models.
relationships: Model Identification uses SACF & SPACF patterns to choose model type and orders (p, q)
Chosen model is passed to the appropriate Estimation Method to calculate parameter values
Estimated Parameters are used to compute model residuals
Residual Analysis checks if residuals resemble white noise
If diagnostic check fails, the process loops back to Model Identification for re-specification
